text:
(In reply to Gerald Pfeifer from comment #3)

Just an overly elaborate port Makefile:

 % pkg info -d sdl2
sdl2-2.0.12_1:
	libxkbcommon-0.10.0_2
	libXxf86vm-1.1.4_3
	libXrandr-1.5.2
	libXinerama-1.1.4_2,1
	libXi-1.7.10,1
	libXext-1.3.4,1
	libXcursor-1.2.0
	libXScrnSaver-1.2.3_2
	wayland-1.18.0_3
	mesa-libs-19.0.8_2
